sections.title: PE
sections.subtitle:
Playground Songs & Rhymes
Jump Rope
Folk Dancing
Free Play
sections.subject: Physical Education

entries.title: About the Course
entries.content:
This course includes the following topic(s): Playground Songs & Rhymes, Jump Rope, Free Play, Folk Dancing

About Playground Songs & Rhymes
Develop hand-eye coordination while playing with words and rhythm using ball-bouncing, passing, and clapping games.

About Jump Rope
Using jump-rope games, students work on hand-eye coordination while playing with words and rhythm.

About Folk Dancing
Learn basic steps for individual, couple, and/or group dances using traditional folk songs.

PE: Grades 1-3
Lessons specifically created for Grades 1-6. We recommend you make sure to include some sort of physical activity as breaks throughout your school day. If you already have sports or similar activities as a regular part of your life rhythms, these lessons are optional.

rows.label: Playground Songs & Rhymes
rows.books: The Book of Playground Songs & Rhymes

rows.books: The Book of Playground Songs & Rhymes

entries.content:
Permission to print for non-commercial use. See Alveary group use policy to use lessons
in a group context.

LINKS: Click text or scan the QR code in the top corner of the lesson plan pages to view
online resources associated with the lessons.

Responsibility for previewing all links rests with the teacher. All links were checked at the
time of publication; however, websites change frequently and may contain objectionable
content. Please report broken links by contacting us through our website.

PE: Grades 1-3
☐ Read the Introduction for Playground Songs & Rhymes p.5

☐ Bookmark the song playlist on SoundCloud. These include songs for folk dances, playground songs and rhymes, and jump rope. Create a free SoundCloud account to use offline. There are links to individual songs in lessons.

☐ Preview games and songs.

Folk Dancing
☐ Read the Introduction for The Book of Song Dances p.4-9.

☐ Bookmark the video folder of folk dances.

☐ Preview dance video; learn beforehand to teach students.

books.title: The Book of Playground Songs & Rhymes
The Book of Playground Songs & Rhymes

supplies.title: Long Jump Rope and Short Jump Rope

blocks.text: Mason emphasized that being physically fit is just as important as being mentally and spiritually fit. She used a combination of Swedish Drill (calisthenic exercises done to music or military-style commands), playground games, sports, dance, free play, and afternoon walks to make sure students had time for vigorous exercise every single day.
Teach students the new song, dance, or sport. Tutorials are often provided.
Play your new game, practice your new dance, sing your new rhyme, etc.!

lessons.title: 20m Jump Rope - Lesson 1
lessons.body:
⍞ Materials: The Book of Playground Songs & Rhymes

PREP: Learn song and motions.
"Icka Backa Soda Cracker" p.48

➜ LISTEN & PRACTICE
1. Read the rhyme aloud, practice reciting.
2. Clap a steady beat to find the rhythm.
3. Jump to rhythm, landing on stressed beats.

lessons.title: 20m Free Play - Lesson 1
lessons.body:
➜ PLAY
Free Play

lessons.title: 20m Playground Songs & Rhymes - Lesson 1
lessons.body:
Hand Clapping: Song & Rhythm
⍞ Materials: Playground Songs & Rhymes

PREP: Learn song and motions.
 “Hot Cross Buns" p.15

➜ LISTEN & PRACTICE
1. Listen to the song several times.
2. Listen and repeat one line at a time.
3. Clap to the rhythm while you sing.
∞ Audio Link: Hot Cross Buns

lessons.title: 20m Free Play - Lesson 2
lessons.body:
➜ PLAY
Free Play

lessons.title: 20m Folk Dancing - Lesson 1
lessons.body:
Great Big House
⍞ Materials: The Book of Song Dances

PREP: Teaching the song dance is much easier if you split up the skills. Teach the song first, then teach the dance slowly while counting the beat. Once those are mastered separately, you can try putting them together. Review Great Big House on p.30. Listen to the song, watch the demo, and learn the dance. Group instructions and partner variation are available.

➜ INTRO
Say: Today, we are going to learn a new song and dance called Great Big House. We will listen to the song one time, then play it again and sing along.

➜ LISTEN
∞ Audio Link: Great Big House
∞ Audio Link: Great Big House (piano only)

➜ VIEW
Watch the demo and learn dance movements. Group Instructions and Partner Variation are available.
∞ Video Link: Great Big House

links.text: Audio Link: Great Big House (piano only)

lessons.title: 20m Jump Rope - Lesson 2
lessons.body:
Icka Backa Soda Cracker
⍞ Materials: Long Jump Rope, Two Twirlers

➜ NOTE
Continue with the same rhyme.

➜ PRACTICE
1. Recite the rhyme without jumping.
2. Listen to rhyme and jump with long rope.
3. Recite the rhyme while jumping.

lessons.title: 20m Jump Rope - Lesson 6
lessons.body:
Variations
⍞ Materials: Long or Short Jump Rope

➜ PRACTICE
• Jump to a variety of rhymes.
• Recite other jump rope rhymes.
• Sing songs or other catchy rhymes.
• Recite Modern Language rhymes.
• Recite poetry or math facts.

➜ PRACTICE
• Vary the skill level, add tricks.
• Increase or decrease speed.
• Run in and out.
• Turn around.
• Touch ground.

lessons.body:

➜ PRACTICE

• Sing songs or other catchy rhymes.
• Recite Modern Language rhymes.
• Recite poetry or math facts.

➜ PRACTICE
• Vary the skill level, add tricks.
• Increase or decrease speed.
• Run in and out.
• Turn around.
• Touch ground.

lessons.title: 20m Jump Rope - Lesson 25
lessons.body:
⍞ Materials: The Book of Playground Songs & Rhymes

PREP: Learn song and motions.
"Postman, Postman" p.46

➜ LISTEN & PRACTICE
1. Read the rhyme aloud, practice reciting.
2. Clap a steady beat to find the rhythm.
3. Jump to rhythm, landing on stressed beats.

lessons.title: 20m Free Play - Lesson 49
lessons.body:
➜ PLAY
Free Play

lessons.title: 20m Playground Songs & Rhymes - Lesson 25
lessons.body:
Hand Clapping: Song & Rhythm
⍞ Materials: Playground Songs & Rhymes

PREP: Learn song and motions.
"My Momma Gave Me a Nickel" p.22

➜ LISTEN & PRACTICE
1. Listen to the song several times.
2. Listen and repeat one line at a time.
3. Clap to the rhythm while you sing.
∞ Audio Link: My Momma Gave Me a Nickel

links.text: My Momma Gave Me a Nickel

lessons.body:
Paw Paw Patch
⍞ Materials: The Book of Song Dances

➜ RECAP
Listen to the song once and sing along. Then sing the song without the music.
∞ Audio Links: Paw Paw Patch

➜ DANCE
Practice the dance while singing the song.
∞ Video Link: Paw Paw Patch

terms.content:
Playground Songs & Rhymes
·  Perform "Hot Cross Buns" OR "Where, Oh, Where" for the teacher to observe.

Folk Dancing
· Perform the song and dance for Great Big House OR Brother Come and Dance.

Playground Songs & Rhymes
· Perform "Say, Say, My Playmate" OR "Obwisana" for the teacher to observe.

Folk Dancing
· Perform the song and dance for Old Joe Clark OR Brown Eyed Mary.

Playground Songs & Rhymes
· Perform "My Momma Gave Me a Nickel" OR "I Pass the Shoe" for the teacher to observe.

Folk Dancing
· Perform the song and dance for Billy, Billy OR Paw Paw Patch.
